insight: Setting a Boss alias to the keyword "hidden" (Settings menu → Alias) hides the nametag above its head, but on builds before the fix for issue #1549 the {boss_alias} variable then resolved to the literal word "hidden" in the damage actionbar (Fighting.Health_Bar.Format), boss bar, spawn egg title, and %boss_alias% placeholders. Fixed so it falls back to the Boss name; on older builds tell users to put {boss_name} in the format instead.

The fight actionbar shown on damaging a Boss is global-only: Fighting.Health_Bar.Enabled in settings.yml toggles it for all Bosses (no per-Boss toggle exists), and its Format supports the Boss variable set including {boss_name}, {boss_alias} and {damage}. The bar's prefix/suffix and health colors are configured under the same Fighting.Health_Bar section.
